title: Heroes of the Frontier
author: Dave Eggers
publisher: The New York Times Longlisted for an Andrew Carnegie Medal for Excellence in Fiction Josie and her children's father have split up
description: "A picaresque adventure and spiritual coming-of-age tale -- On the Road crossed with Henderson the Rain King... Deeply affecting."" --Michiko Kakutani
subjects: Josie makes a run for it to Alaska with her kids
notes: Paul and Ana. At first their trip feels like a vacation: they see bears and bison
review: and the curse of a violent America
